title: 2011165 Optimized
description: Many mods to boost performance and add immersive features to make Minecraft the most fun game it can be.
body:
TURN OFF DUNGEONS AND TAVERNS MOD IN MODPACK SETTINGS

This Minecraft Modpack is full of essential mods to help Minecraft run faster on your system. Whether you have a fast or slow computer, these mods can make Minecraft run better than ever. With mods like Sodium, EntityCulling and Ferrite Core, Minecraft can as best as it can. There are also mods that add immersive features to Minecraft such as Ambient Sounds and Do A Barrel Roll for Elytras. There is also avalibility for shaders with the Iris Shaders mod. There are two shader packs included which are Miniture Shader for lower end computers and Super Duper Vanilla for higher end computers. With the help of Xaero's Minimap and World Map you can never get lost in your singleplayer world or servers. The Essential Mod adds even more features to host your singleplayer worlds as miniservers for your friends to join if they have the mod installed. All this with even more mods can make your Minecraft experience the best it can be!
